prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-AOCPCK-8PC-SML-GRN Product Type: GUN_CLEANING_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 8pc Compact Mini Universal Pistol Hand Gun Cleaning Kit with Brass Rod (.357, .38, 9mm) Description: The ASR Outdoor pistol cleaning kit comes with everything you'll need to keep your pistol clean and ensure optimal performance - 2 bronze brushes, 2 wool brushes, 2 brass rods, a plastic handle, and microfiber absorbent patches. It is compatible with .357, 38 and 9mm pistols.

The kit comes with a durable plastic carry case that measures just 5" x 3.5" and weighs .25lbs (4oz) so it will easily fit inside most range bags. All of the pieces fit inside, ensuring that your gun cleaning tools stay organized when not in use.

Our kit comes with 2 different types of gun cleaning brushes - phosphor bronze and wool. Bronze brushes are great for a superior clean, and wool brushes can easily sweep out loose carbon. We've also included 15 microfiber absorbent patches to help absorb dust and debris, and they are great for applying cleaning solvents without damaging your pistol. Make sure to grab this pistol cleaning kit before your next trip to the range. Search Terms: gun cleaning kit gun cleaning mat gun cleaning patches gun cleaning supplies gun cleaning kits hand gun cleaning kits hand gun cases shooting range gear shooting rifle cleaning kit 9mm cleaning kit small caliber cleaning kit shooting range tools Features: - 8 PIECE PISTOL CLEANING KIT - The ASR Outdoor pistol cleaning kit comes with everything you'll need to keep your pistol clean and ensure optimal performance - 2 bronze brushes, 2 wool brushes, 2 brass rods, a plastic handle, and microfiber absorbent patches - MULTI-CALIBER COMPATIBILITY - This pistol cleaning kit is suitable for .357, 38 and 9mm pistols. With this kit, you'll be able to keep your pistols clean and ready for your next trip to the range - COMPACT DESIGN - The kit comes with a durable plastic carry case that measures just 5" x 3.5" and weighs .25lbs (4oz) so it will easily fit inside most range bags. All of the pieces fit inside, ensuring that your gun cleaning tools stay organized when not in use. - 2 TYPES OF BRUSHES - Our kit comes with 2 different types of gun cleaning brushes - phosphor bronze wire brush and wool bristle brush. Bronze brushes are great for a superior clean, and wool brushes can easily sweep out loose carbon - ABSORBENT PATCHES - The kit comes with microfiber absorbent patches to help absorb dust and debris, and they are great for applying cleaning solvents without damaging your pistol === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8pc Compact Mini Pistol Gun Cleaning Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8-pc Compact Mini Green Pistol Cleaning Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: Multi-Caliber 357 38 9Mm, Bronze And Wool Brushes, Brass Rods, Microfiber Patches, Portable Carry Case

openai.title_differentiation: Compact Carry Case, 2 Bronze Brushes, 2 Wool Brushes, 2 Brass Rods, 15 Microfiber Patches, 357 38 9Mm
